examples.title: Algorithm: Thread Scheduling
examples.description: Demonstrates a basic thread scheduling algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ThreadScheduling
INPUT: threads, timeQuantum
OUTPUT: scheduledThreads

BEGIN
 WHILE readyQueue is not empty
 thread = dequeue(readyQueue)
 IF thread.timeLeft > timeQuantum
 thread.timeLeft -= timeQuantum
 enqueue(readyQueue, thread)
 ELSE
 thread.timeLeft = 0
 scheduledThreads.add(thread)
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic thread scheduling algorithm. It takes in a list of threads and a time quantum, and outputs a list of scheduled threads.

examples.title: Python: Thread Scheduling
examples.description: Demonstrates a basic thread scheduling algorithm in Python
examples.explanation: This Python code demonstrates a basic thread scheduling algorithm. It defines a ThreadScheduler class that takes in a time quantum and a list of threads, and outputs a list of scheduled threads.
